name: MMGraphRAG: Bridging Vision and Language with Interpretable Multimodal Knowledge Graphs

description: arXiv:2507.20804v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) suffer from hallucinations due to their static parametric knowledge. Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and GraphRAG mitigate this issue by incorporating external knowledge and structured reasoning over knowledge graphs (KGs). However, existing approaches remain largely text-centric, as constructing fine-grained...
author: Xueyao Wan, Hang Yu
